prompt_text: Airbyte vs Stitch pricing and features
response:
# Airbyte vs Stitch: Pricing & Features Comparison

## Pricing Model

| Aspect | Airbyte | Stitch |
|--------|---------|--------|
| **Pricing Type** | Usage-based + Self-hosted option | Per-connector + Data volume |
| **Self-Hosted** | Free (open-source) | Not available |
| **Cloud Starter** | ~$0-$100/month | ~$100/month |
| **Scaling** | Pay per sync (cheaper at scale) | Pay per source + data GB |
| **Free Tier** | Limited syncs on cloud | ~14-day trial |

## Feature Comparison

### Data Connectors
| Feature | Airbyte | Stitch |
|---------|---------|--------|
| **# of Sources** | 500+ | 200+ |
| **# of Destinations** | 100+ | 60+ |
| **Custom Connectors** | Yes (lower-code) | Limited |
| **Connector Speed** | Generally faster | Varies |

### Core Capabilities
| Feature | Airbyte | Stitch |
|---------|---------|--------|
| **Incremental Sync** | ✅ | ✅ |
| **Full Refresh** | ✅ | ✅ |
| **Schema Evolution** | ✅ | ✅ |
| **Data Transformation** | Basic | Limited |
| **Scheduling** | Flexible | Less granular |
| **Real-time Sync** | ✅ (partial) | ❌ |

### Infrastructure
| Feature | Airbyte | Stitch |
|---------|---------|--------|
| **Deployment Options** | Cloud, Docker, K8s | Cloud only |
| **VPC/Private Deployment** | ✅ | ❌ |
| **Data Residency Control** | ✅ | Limited |

## When to Choose

### **Choose Airbyte if you:**
- Need maximum connector variety
- Want self-hosted/private options
- Have moderate-to-high data volumes (cost-efficient)
- Need custom connector development
- Require deployment flexibility

### **Choose Stitch if you:**
- Prefer fully managed, no-setup experience
- Have simple, predictable sync needs
- Use common, well-supported sources
- Want simplicity over flexibility
- Have lower data volumes

## Cost Comparison Example

**100GB monthly data, 10 daily syncs:**
- **Airbyte Cloud**: ~$200-300/month
- **Stitch**: ~$300-500/month
- **Airbyte Self-Hosted**: ~$50-100/month (server costs only)

## Key Differences Summary

| Priority | Winner |
|----------|--------|
| **Cost at Scale** | Airbyte |
| **Ease of Setup** | Stitch |
| **Connector Count** | Airbyte |
| **Simplicity** | Stitch |
| **Control & Customization** | Airbyte |

**Note:** Pricing and features update frequently—verify current details on their websites before deciding.
